org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Class AbstractAnchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractModelObject
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractAnchor<G,N,A,E>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph.
    N - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    A - is the type of the anchors inside the graph.
    E - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ModelObject>, Anchor<G,N,A,E>, ModelObject, PropertyNames
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    StandardAnchor

    public abstract class AbstractAnchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
extends AbstractModelObject
implements Anchor<G,N,A,E>
    This is the Anchor that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Marc BAUMGARTNER
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean canConnectAsEndAnchor(E edge, A startAnchor)
      Reply if this anchor can be the end of the specified edge if the beginning is binded to the specified anchor.
      boolean canConnectAsStartAnchor(E edge, A endAnchor)
      Reply if this anchor can be the beginning of the specified edge if the end is binded to the specified anchor.
      ModelObject findModelObject(UUID id)
      Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id.
      AnchorLocation getLocation()
      Gets the location of the Anchor according to the owner
      N getNode()
      Get the Node that contains this Anchor.
      Map<String,Object> getProperties()
      Replies all the properties of the model object, except the UUID.
      void setLocation(AnchorLocation location)
      Sets the location of the Anchor according to the owner The name of the property is "anchorLocation".
      void setNode(N node)
      Set the Node that contains this Anchor.
      void setProperties(Map<String,Object> properties)
      Set the properties of the model object, except the UUID.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractAnchor

        public AbstractAnchor()
        Construct a new XAnchor.

    • Method Detail

      • findModelObject

        public ModelObject findModelObject(UUID id)
        Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id. This method goes through all the model objects and sub-model objects.
        Specified by:
        findModelObject in interface ModelObject
        Returns:
        the object with the specified id, or null.

      • getProperties

        public Map<String,Object> getProperties()
        Replies all the properties of the model object, except the UUID.
        Specified by:
        getProperties in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        getProperties in class AbstractModelObject
        Returns:
        the properties of this model object, except the UUID.

        Specified by:
        setProperties in interface ModelObject
        Overrides:
        setProperties in class AbstractModelObject
        Parameters:
        properties - are the properties of this model object, except the UUID.

      • setNode

        public void setNode(N node)
        Set the Node that contains this Anchor.
        Specified by:
        setNode in interface Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Parameters:
        node - Node container.

      • getNode

        Specified by:

      • setLocation

        public void setLocation(AnchorLocation location)
        Sets the location of the Anchor according to the owner The name of the property is "anchorLocation".
        Specified by:
        setLocation in interface Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Parameters:
        location - the location of the Anchor

      • getLocation

        public AnchorLocation getLocation()
        Gets the location of the Anchor according to the owner

        Specified by:
        getLocation in interface Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Returns:
        the location of the Anchor

      • canConnectAsStartAnchor

        public boolean canConnectAsStartAnchor(E edge,
                              A endAnchor)
        Reply if this anchor can be the beginning of the specified edge if the end is binded to the specified anchor. By default all edges can be connected to the anchor. Subclasses must override this method to have a more restrictive managing.
        Specified by:
        canConnectAsStartAnchor in interface Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Parameters:
        edge - is the edge to test against this anchor..
        endAnchor - is the anchor in the other side of the given edge. It may be null.
        Returns:
        true if this anchor can be connected to the given edge as a start anchor.

      • canConnectAsEndAnchor

        public boolean canConnectAsEndAnchor(E edge,
                            A startAnchor)
        Reply if this anchor can be the end of the specified edge if the beginning is binded to the specified anchor. By default all edges can be connected to the anchor. Subclasses must override this method to have a more restrictive managing.
        Specified by:
        canConnectAsEndAnchor in interface Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Parameters:
        edge - is the edge to test against this anchor..
        startAnchor - is the anchor in the other side of the given edge. It may be null.
        Returns:
        true if this anchor can be connected to the given edge as a start anchor.

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class AbstractModelObject
